commands.observation: Finished dev profile successfully for all targets/features.
Workspace test suite and doctests passed under the documented maintenance command.
Clippy completed cleanly with warnings denied.
readme_contract tests passed with named test output visible.
docs_contract tests passed with named test output visible.
Doc-tests passed, including src/lib.rs line-4 compile doctest.
Example ran without credentials and printed env-based client configuration guidance.
Example printed schema and strict-tool configuration successfully.
Example printed status, request_id, and content-type metadata.
Example printed embedding model, dimensions, and encoding format.
Example prepared chunked upload source and vector-store file details without credentials.
Example printed compatibility chat, legacy completions, and preferred Responses models.
Exact README contract command from docs/quickstart.md and docs/maintenance.md passed.
Exact docs contract command from docs/maintenance.md passed.
Exact rustdoc command from docs/maintenance.md passed with warnings denied.

assertions.title: Compatibility Documentation Preserves Migration Guidance Toward Responses

steps.expected: Migration guide positions Responses as primary and compatibility namespaces as secondary
steps.observed: docs/migration-guide.md:3,9-11,36,60 explicitly positions Responses as primary and chat/completions namespaces as compatibility-only.

steps.expected: Docs harness validates migration-guide content and current example references
Published migration example exercises compatibility and Responses surfaces together
steps.observed: Example ran successfully and printed compatibility chat, legacy completions, and preferred Responses models.

assertions.title: README Quickstart Matches the Public Client API

steps.expected: README quickstart uses current public client API and env-based auth flow
steps.observed: README.md:15 starts the quickstart with use openai_rust::OpenAI; README quickstart matches the current public exports and env-driven builder usage.

steps.expected: README fenced Rust block compiles and README command lines resolve

assertions.title: README Capability Claims Match Implemented Surfaces

steps.expected: README capability and crate-map claims resolve to real exported surfaces and local links
steps.observed: readme_sections_links_and_claims_resolve_from_the_published_markdown passed, covering openai_rust::OpenAI/resources/realtime/helpers/blocking exports and local README links.

assertions.title: docs/ Guides Are Executable or Mechanically Verifiable

steps.expected: Docs harness validates required guide files, linked examples, fenced snippets, and documented commands

assertions.title: Documented Developer Onboarding Works From a Clean Checkout

steps.action: Run documented local validation commands with isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR
steps.expected: Quickstart validation commands complete from a fresh build directory without extra fixes
steps.observed: cargo test --test readme_contract, cargo check --examples --all-features, and cargo test --doc all exited 0 against the isolated docs-readme target directory.

steps.action: Run the documented dry-run onboarding examples
steps.expected: All published onboarding examples compile and run without credentials
steps.observed: responses_quickstart, responses_streaming, structured_outputs, request_metadata, embeddings, upload_to_vector_store, and chat_completions_migration all exited 0 and printed the expected dry-run output without manual intervention.

assertions.title: Mission Deliverable Notes Are Present and Consistent

steps.expected: Docs note files exist and their claims/examples stay aligned with repository surfaces
steps.observed: docs_contract passed, including existence checks for docs/architecture-note.md, docs/api-coverage.md, docs/intentional-gaps.md, and docs/maintenance.md plus content checks for maintenance commands, migration wording, examples, and intentional gaps.

All maintenance commands listed in docs/maintenance.md exited 0, including cargo fmt/check/test/clippy, exact docs/readme contract tests, cargo check --examples --all-features, cargo test --doc, and RUSTDOCFLAGS='-D warnings' cargo doc --no-deps --all-features.

assertions.title: All README Snippets and Documented Commands Stay Mechanically Valid

steps.expected: README fenced Rust and shell blocks validate against current repo state
steps.observed: readme_fenced_snippets_and_commands_validate_against_real_markdown_locations passed; the README fence count stayed at 3 and all extracted command lines validated.

steps.expected: Public doctest snippet coverage still compiles
steps.observed: Doc-tests passed, including src/lib.rs compile doctest.

summary: Validated 7 assigned publish/docs assertions through cargo-native README/docs harnesses and documented onboarding/maintenance commands. All 7 assertions passed; all 19 recorded commands exited 0 using the isolated docs-readme CARGO_TARGET_DIR.
